select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.rootid,     d.agreedocid,     p.departid as managerdepartid,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappdocument d      join eappprogress p on d.id = p.documentid   where p.accesstype = 2 and d.state = 400;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.rootid,     d.agreedocid,     dp.departid as deptid,     dp.folderid,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappdocument d      join eappdepartdoc dp on d.id = dp.docid      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappprogress p      join eappdocument d on p.documentid = d.id   where (d.state = any (array[300, 400])) and p.accesstype = 3 and p.managestate = 3000;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4,     w.seq,     w.docid,     w.ealink1,     w.ealink2,     w.ealink3,     w.ealink4,     w.ealink5,     w.ealink6,     w.ealink7,     w.ealink8,     w.ealink9,     w.ealink10,     s.saupjangcode,     s.saupjangname    from eappprogress p      join eappdocument d on p.documentid = d.id      left join eappdocumentwbld w on d.id = w.docid      left join eappdocuserserial s on d.id = s.docid   where d.state = 300 and p.accesstype = 3 and p.managestate = 3100;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappprogress p      join eappdocument d on p.documentid = d.id   where d.state = 400 and p.arrivestate = 300 and (p.accesstype <> all (array[20, 21])) and p.managerid::text ~~ '#dr#%'::text;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappprogress p      join eappdocument d on p.documentid = d.id   where d.state = 300 and p.arrivestate = 300 and (p.accesstype <> all (array[20, 21])) and p.managerid::text ~~ '#dr#%'::text;

select p.id,     p.documentid,     p.managerid,     p.accesstype,     p.accesskey,     d.lcategory,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     p.arrivedate,     d.regdate,     p.managestate,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappprogress p      join eappdocument d on p.documentid = d.id   where d.state = 300 and p.arrivestate = 200 and (p.accesstype <> all (array[20, 21])) and p.managerid::text ~~ '#dr#%'::text;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.rootid,     d.agreedocid,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4,     p.departname1,     p.departname2,     p.departname3,     p.departname4    from ( select eappdocument.id,             eappdocument.formid,             eappdocument.erpkey,             eappdocument.title,             eappdocument.lcategory,             eappdocument.progid,             eappdocument.regdate,             eappdocument.state,             eappdocument.writerid,             eappdocument.departid,             eappdocument.authoritylevel,             eappdocument.isdraftdel,             eappdocument.groupcode,             eappdocument.edmsstate,             eappdocument.edmsid,             eappdocument.serial,             eappdocument.isclose,             eappdocument.rootid,             eappdocument.agreedocid,             eappdocument.deptname1,             eappdocument.deptname2,             eappdocument.deptname3,             eappdocument.deptname4            from eappdocument           where eappdocument.state = 400) d      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4,     p.departname1,     p.departname2,     p.departname3,     p.departname4    from eappdocument d      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id      left join eappdocumentwbld w on d.id = w.docid   where d.state = 400;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.isnotice,     d.rootid,     d.agreedocid,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4,     p.departname1,     p.departname2,     p.departname3,     p.departname4    from ( select eappdocument.id,             eappdocument.formid,             eappdocument.erpkey,             eappdocument.title,             eappdocument.lcategory,             eappdocument.progid,             eappdocument.regdate,             eappdocument.state,             eappdocument.writerid,             eappdocument.departid,             eappdocument.authoritylevel,             eappdocument.isdraftdel,             eappdocument.groupcode,             eappdocument.edmsstate,             eappdocument.edmsid,             eappdocument.serial,             eappdocument.isclose,             eappdocument.rootid,             eappdocument.agreedocid,             eappdocument.isnotice,             eappdocument.deptname1,             eappdocument.deptname2,             eappdocument.deptname3,             eappdocument.deptname4            from eappdocument           where eappdocument.state = 300) d      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id   where d.state = 300;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     p.representid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.progid,     p.accesskey,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.rootid,     d.agreedocid,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4,     p.departname1,     p.departname2,     p.departname3,     p.departname4    from ( select eappdocument.id,             eappdocument.formid,             eappdocument.erpkey,             eappdocument.title,             eappdocument.lcategory,             eappdocument.regdate,             eappdocument.state,             eappdocument.writerid,             eappdocument.departid,             eappdocument.progid,             eappdocument.authoritylevel,             eappdocument.isdraftdel,             eappdocument.groupcode,             eappdocument.edmsstate,             eappdocument.edmsid,             eappdocument.serial,             eappdocument.isclose,             eappdocument.rootid,             eappdocument.agreedocid,             eappdocument.deptname1,             eappdocument.deptname2,             eappdocument.deptname3,             eappdocument.deptname4            from eappdocument           where eappdocument.state = 500) d      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.progid,     p.accesskey,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.rootid,     d.agreedocid,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4,     p.departname1,     p.departname2,     p.departname3,     p.departname4    from ( select eappdocument.id,             eappdocument.formid,             eappdocument.erpkey,             eappdocument.title,             eappdocument.lcategory,             eappdocument.regdate,             eappdocument.state,             eappdocument.writerid,             eappdocument.departid,             eappdocument.progid,             eappdocument.authoritylevel,             eappdocument.isdraftdel,             eappdocument.groupcode,             eappdocument.edmsstate,             eappdocument.edmsid,             eappdocument.serial,             eappdocument.isclose,             eappdocument.rootid,             eappdocument.agreedocid,             eappdocument.deptname1,             eappdocument.deptname2,             eappdocument.deptname3,             eappdocument.deptname4            from eappdocument           where eappdocument.state = 200) d      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4,     duty.dutycode    from eappdocument d      join eappdocduty duty on d.id = duty.eadocid      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id   where d.state = 400;

select d.id,     d.id as documentid,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.regdate,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.serial,     d.groupcode,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappdocument d   where d.state = 100;

select p.id,     p.documentid,     p.managerid,     p.accesstype,     p.accesskey,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.lcategory,     o.title,     r.progid,     d.regdate,     p.managestate,     r.id as hid,     p.arrivedate,     r.receiverid,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.operationtype,     o.id as operationid,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     coalesce(o.issend, '0'::bpchar) as issend,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappoperation o      join eappdocument d on o.docid = d.id and o.issend = '1'::bpchar      join eappprogress p on p.documentid = d.id      join eappreceive r on p.id = r.progid   where r.receivestate = 0 and p.accesstype = 23;

select p.id,     p.documentid,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.authoritylevel,     d.totalstoredboxid,     p.managedate,     d.regdate,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.state,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappdocument d      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id   where d.isclose = '1'::bpchar;

select p.id,     p.documentid,     p.managerid,     p.accesstype,     p.accesskey,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.lcategory,         case             when (d.operationtype = 1 or d.operationtype = 2) and o.issend = '1'::bpchar then coalesce(o.title, d.title)             else d.title         end as title,     d.operationtype,     d.regdate,     p.managestate,     r.id as hid,     p.arrivedate,     r.progid,     r.receivedate,     r.receiverid,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     coalesce(o.issend, '0'::bpchar) as issend,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappprogress p      join eappdocument d on p.documentid = d.id      join eappreceive r on p.id = r.progid      left join eappoperation o on d.id = o.docid   where p.accesstype = 25 and d.state <> (-1) and r.receivestate <> (-1);

select p.id,     p.documentid,     coalesce(ps.premanagerid, p.managerid) as managerid,     p.representid,     p.accesstype,     p.accesskey,     d.isnotice,     d.isautoafter,     d.lcategory,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.progid,     d.title,     p.arrivedate,     d.regdate,     p.managestate,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     ps.premanagedate as managedate,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.state,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappprogress p      join eappdocument d on p.documentid = d.id      join eappprogresssubdata ps on p.documentid = ps.predocumentid and p.managerid::text = ps.premanagerid::text and p.accesstype = ps.preaccesstype and p.lineorder = ps.prelineorder   where d.progid is not null and ps.premanagestate = 620;

select p.id,     p.documentid,     p.managerid,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.lcategory,     d.serial,     d.title,     d.regdate,     p.managestate,     pr.userid,     pr.folderid,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappdocument d      join eappprivatedoc pr on d.id = pr.docid      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id;

select p.id,     p.documentid,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.regdate,     d.authoritylevel,     d.totalstoredboxid,     p.managedate,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappdocument d      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id      join eapptreeitem t on d.totalstoredboxid = t.id and t.useyn = 'y'::bpchar   where d.state = 1000;

select p.id,     p.documentid,     p.managerid,     p.accesstype,     p.accesskey,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.lcategory,         case             when (d.operationtype = 1 or d.operationtype = 2) and o.issend = '1'::bpchar then coalesce(o.title, d.title)             else d.title         end as title,     d.operationtype,     d.regdate,     p.managestate,     r.id as hid,     r.receivedate,     r.receiverid,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     coalesce(o.issend, '0'::bpchar) as issend,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappprogress p      join eappreceive r on p.id = r.progid      join eappdocument d on p.documentid = d.id      join eappform f on d.formid = f.id and f.auditline = '1'::bpchar      left join eappoperation o on d.id = o.docid   where d.id = d.rootid and p.accesstype = 21 and (r.receivestate <> all (array[(-1), (-100)]));

select p.id,     p.documentid,     p.managerid,     p.accesstype,     p.accesskey,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.lcategory,         case             when (d.operationtype = 1 or d.operationtype = 2) and o.issend = '1'::bpchar then coalesce(o.title, d.title)             else d.title         end as title,     d.operationtype,     d.regdate,     p.managestate,     r.id as hid,     r.receivedate,     r.receiverid,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     coalesce(o.issend, '0'::bpchar) as issend,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from ( select eappreceive.id,             eappreceive.receivedate,             eappreceive.receiverid,             eappreceive.progid            from eappreceive           where eappreceive.receivestate = any (array[100, (-100)])) r      join eappprogress p on p.id = r.progid      join ( select eappdocument.id,             eappdocument.formid,             eappdocument.erpkey,             eappdocument.lcategory,             eappdocument.title,             eappdocument.operationtype,             eappdocument.regdate,             eappdocument.departid,             eappdocument.writerid,             eappdocument.groupcode,             eappdocument.edmsstate,             eappdocument.edmsid,             eappdocument.serial,             eappdocument.deptname1,             eappdocument.deptname2,             eappdocument.deptname3,             eappdocument.deptname4            from eappdocument           where eappdocument.state <> (-1)) d on p.documentid = d.id      left join eappoperation o on d.id = o.docid;

select r.receivestate,     p.id,     p.documentid,     p.managerid,     p.accesstype,     p.accesskey,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.lcategory,         case             when (d.operationtype = 1 or d.operationtype = 2) and o.issend = '1'::bpchar then coalesce(o.title, d.title)             else d.title         end as title,     d.operationtype,     d.regdate,     p.managestate,     r.id as hid,     p.arrivedate,     r.progid,     r.receivedate,     r.receiverid,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     coalesce(o.issend, '0'::bpchar) as issend,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappprogress p      join eappdocument d on p.documentid = d.id      join eappreceive r on p.id = r.progid      left join eappoperation o on d.id = o.docid   where (p.accesstype = any (array[20, 21, 25, 26])) and d.state <> (-1) and (r.receivestate = any (array[0, 100]));

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.operationdate,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.operationtype,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappoperation o      join ( select eappdocument.id,             eappdocument.formid,             eappdocument.erpkey,             eappdocument.title,             eappdocument.lcategory,             eappdocument.progid,             eappdocument.regdate,             eappdocument.state,             eappdocument.writerid,             eappdocument.operationdate,             eappdocument.departid,             eappdocument.authoritylevel,             eappdocument.isdraftdel,             eappdocument.groupcode,             eappdocument.operationtype,             eappdocument.edmsstate,             eappdocument.edmsid,             eappdocument.serial,             eappdocument.deptname1,             eappdocument.deptname2,             eappdocument.deptname3,             eappdocument.deptname4            from eappdocument           where eappdocument.operationtype > 1) d on o.docid = d.id and o.issend = '1'::bpchar      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id;

select p.id,     p.documentid,     p.managerid,     p.accesstype,     p.accesskey,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.lcategory,     d.title,     r.progid,     d.regdate,     p.managestate,     r.id as hid,     p.arrivedate,     r.receiverid,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from ( select eappprogress.id,             eappprogress.documentid,             eappprogress.managerid,             eappprogress.accesstype,             eappprogress.accesskey,             eappprogress.managestate,             eappprogress.arrivedate            from eappprogress           where eappprogress.accesstype = 26) p      join ( select eappreceive.id,             eappreceive.progid,             eappreceive.receiverid            from eappreceive           where eappreceive.receivestate = 0) r on p.id = r.progid      join ( select eappdocument.id,             eappdocument.formid,             eappdocument.erpkey,             eappdocument.lcategory,             eappdocument.title,             eappdocument.regdate,             eappdocument.departid,             eappdocument.writerid,             eappdocument.groupcode,             eappdocument.edmsstate,             eappdocument.edmsid,             eappdocument.serial,             eappdocument.deptname1,             eappdocument.deptname2,             eappdocument.deptname3,             eappdocument.deptname4            from eappdocument           where eappdocument.state <> (-1)) d on p.documentid = d.id;

select p.documentid,     p.id,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.lcategory,     d.progid,     p.arrivedate,     p.accesskey,     d.regdate,     p.managedate,     p.managerid,     d.state,     d.writerid,     d.departid,     d.authoritylevel,     d.isdraftdel,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappdocument d      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id   where d.state = any (array[400, 1000, 1100]);

select p.id,     p.documentid,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.title,     d.regdate,     d.lcategory,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     d.isclose,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappdocument d      join eappprogress p on d.progid = p.id   where d.state = (-2);

select p.id,     p.documentid,     p.managerid,     p.accesstype,     p.accesskey,     d.formid,     d.erpkey,     d.lcategory,         case             when (d.operationtype = 1 or d.operationtype = 2) and o.issend = '1'::bpchar then coalesce(o.title, d.title)             else d.title         end as title,     d.operationtype,     d.regdate,     p.managestate,     r.id as hid,     p.arrivedate,     r.progid,     r.receivedate,     r.receiverid,     d.departid,     d.writerid,     d.groupcode,     d.edmsstate,     d.edmsid,     d.serial,     coalesce(o.issend, '0'::bpchar) as issend,     d.deptname1,     d.deptname2,     d.deptname3,     d.deptname4    from eappprogress p      join eappdocument d on p.documentid = d.id      join eappreceive r on p.id = r.progid      left join eappoperation o on d.id = o.docid   where (p.accesstype = any (array[20, 21, 24])) and d.state <> (-1) and r.receivestate = 0;

select d.id,     d.title,     d.writerid,     d.regdate,     d.state,     d.checkoutid,     d.departid,     d.version,     d.authoritylevel,     d.doclevel,     d.eadocflag,     d.moddate,     coalesce(d.moddate, d.regdate) as updatedate,     d.groupcode,     d.serial,     f.folderid,     f.id as fid,     f.divid,     d.contenttext,     d.keyword,     coalesce(d.hit, 0) as hit,     200 as eaauth,     d.summary    from edmsdocument d      join edmsdocfolder f on d.id = f.docid   where d.docstate = '0'::bpchar and d.isdelete = 'n'::bpchar and d.versionstate::text = 'y'::text and d.valdate > now();

select d.id,     d.title,     d.writerid,     d.regdate,     d.state,     d.checkoutid,     d.departid,     d.version,     d.authoritylevel,     d.doclevel,     d.eadocflag,     d.moddate,     coalesce(d.moddate, d.regdate) as updatedate,     d.groupcode,     d.serial,     d.keyword,     coalesce(d.hit, 0) as hit,     200 as eaauth,     d.summary    from edmsdocument d   where d.docstate = '0'::bpchar and d.isdelete = 'n'::bpchar and d.versionstate::text = 'y'::text and d.valdate > now();

select d.id,     d.title,     d.writerid,     d.regdate,     d.state,     d.checkoutid,     d.departid,     d.version,     d.authoritylevel,     d.doclevel,     d.eadocflag,     d.moddate,     coalesce(d.moddate, d.regdate) as updatedate,     d.groupcode,     d.serial,     p.folderid,     p.id as pid,     p.userid,     d.keyword,     coalesce(d.hit, 0) as hit,     200 as eaauth,     d.summary    from edmsdocument d      join edmsorgdoc p on d.id = p.docid   where d.docstate = '0'::bpchar and d.isdelete = 'n'::bpchar and d.versionstate::text = 'y'::text and d.valdate > now();

select d.id,     d.title,     d.writerid,     d.regdate,     d.state,     d.checkoutid,     d.departid,     d.version,     d.authoritylevel,     d.doclevel,     d.eadocflag,     d.moddate,     coalesce(d.moddate, d.regdate) as updatedate,     d.groupcode,     d.serial,     p.folderid,     p.id as pid,     p.userid,     d.keyword,     coalesce(d.hit, 0) as hit,     200 as eaauth,     d.summary    from edmsdocument d      join edmsprivatedoc p on d.id = p.docid   where d.docstate = '0'::bpchar and d.isdelete = 'n'::bpchar and d.versionstate::text = 'y'::text and d.valdate > now();

select pg_stat_statements.userid,     pg_stat_statements.dbid,     pg_stat_statements.query,     pg_stat_statements.calls,     pg_stat_statements.total_time,     pg_stat_statements.rows,     pg_stat_statements.shared_blks_hit,     pg_stat_statements.shared_blks_read,     pg_stat_statements.shared_blks_dirtied,     pg_stat_statements.shared_blks_written,     pg_stat_statements.local_blks_hit,     pg_stat_statements.local_blks_read,     pg_stat_statements.local_blks_dirtied,     pg_stat_statements.local_blks_written,     pg_stat_statements.temp_blks_read,     pg_stat_statements.temp_blks_written,     pg_stat_statements.blk_read_time,     pg_stat_statements.blk_write_time    from pg_stat_statements() pg_stat_statements(userid, dbid, query, calls, total_time, rows, shared_blks_hit, shared_blks_read, shared_blks_dirtied, shared_blks_written, local_blks_hit, local_blks_read, local_blks_dirtied, local_blks_written, temp_blks_read, temp_blks_written, blk_read_time, blk_write_time);

select t.userno,     t.workingday,     workingtime_timeworkforuser_funtion_v2(t.userno, t.workingday::character varying) as workingtime    from ( select wt.userno,             wt2.workingdayofcompany as workingday            from workingtime_times wt              join workingtime_times_v2 wt2 on wt.workingno = wt2.workingno           group by wt.userno, wt2.workingdayofcompany) t   order by t.workingday desc;

select v1.workingno,     v1.userno,     v1.timetype,     v2.checkdatetimeoffset,     v1.provider,     v1.latitude,     v1.longitude,     v1.ipserver,     v1.distance,     v1.latcompany,     v1.lngcompany    from workingtime_times v1      join workingtime_times_v2 v2 on v1.workingno = v2.workingno;
